name_cn:
Premium
🔥🔥🔥
Small Blue Denim Monogram Praphy Shoulder Bag, featuring a crescent shape, with a classic large metal FEND1] logo decoration at the bottom. The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when worn under the arm, simply a walking trendsetter!
Small size 20×7.5×13cm
